scripts.export: npm run copy-specs && next build && cp -r out/ ../docs/schema-viewer/
scripts.copy-specs: mkdir -p specs && cp ../schemas/asyncapi/bms/bms.yaml specs/bms.yaml && cp ../schemas/asyncapi/power-management/power-management.yaml specs/power-management.yaml && cp ../schemas/asyncapi/nico/nico.yaml specs/nico.yaml && cp ../schemas/asyncapi/spiffe-exchange/pub-keysets.yaml specs/spiffe-exchange.yaml
